Entry.JapaneseText: 人の命を犠牲にする事で 新たな命を創り出す魔剣
Entry.EnglishText: A magic sword that creates new life by sacrificing human lives.

Entry.JapaneseText: 死んだ者すらも創り出せる力……か
Entry.EnglishText: A power that can even recreate the dead... huh.

Entry.JapaneseText: そんなもの、使っていいはずがない。 誰かを犠牲にして命を生み出すなど あってはならない！
Entry.EnglishText: Something like that should not be used. Creating life by sacrificing someone cannot be allowed!

Entry.JapaneseText: クロエ？ 聞いてるのか、クロエ！？
Entry.EnglishText: Chloe? Can you hear me, Chloe?

Entry.JapaneseText: え、あ、え！？ どうした、クーリッジ？
Entry.EnglishText: Huh, wha, huh?! What is it, Coolidge?

Entry.JapaneseText: なにボサッとしてるんだ？ やっとデュークに追いついたんだぞ！
Entry.EnglishText: What are you doing blanking out? We've finally caught up to Duke!

Entry.JapaneseText: 魔剣エターナルソードなんて 絶対に使わせるわけにはいかない！
Entry.EnglishText: We can't let him use the demonic Eternal Sword no matter what!
Entry.Notes: Need to make a note of this for myself as well, but 魔 can mean magic or devil/evil. When I finish the tl, I'll figure out if I need to be using magic or evil/demonic/etc.

Entry.JapaneseText: あ、ああ。 もちろんだ……
